title: mentha hirsuta var. riparia
intro: Mentha hirsuta var. riparia, also known as woolly mint or river mint, is a variety of the Mentha hirsuta species, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is native to Europe and Asia, and has been used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant contains menthol, menthone, and other compounds that exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha hirsuta var. riparia include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting respiratory health, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or added to food as a flavoring agent.
